title: A New Mail Service
article_text: A researcher named Tom used to work for a mail company. He was a fellow with a very ordinary personality. One day, he had a terrible idea to capture a peak discount for participants. He sent a selection of mail to every entry in the database. The chairman said that the outcome was a relief from debt. Tom blamed himself for the mental stress he caused. Specifically, the vision of the future was not clear. He was still trying to tip the chemical balance. Anywhere he went, people talked about the fat mistake. But he felt that the honor of fixing it was his goal.
